programmes.show_name: The Great Plague with Rob Rinder & Ruth Goodman
programmes.show_description: Nearly a quarter of Londoners died. But did it have the same impact on the rich and the poor? Rob and historian Ruth step into their shoes to discover the truth.

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programmes.show_description: Ben journeys to Ireland's rugged Atlantic coastline to stay with Judith, a widow of 80 who rejected a modern way of life for one closer to nature.

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programmes.show_description: The Amazon is where Ben's own adventures began. Now he is back to meet Chris, a Scotsman who has made his home in the most remote area of this jungle.

From a vineyard that has been making one of Britain's favourite tipples - port - travel down the line that once transported it to the city that gave it its name: Porto.

programmes.show_name: Sunken Warships: Secrets from the Deep

programmes.show_name: Jane McDonald: From Pole to Pole
programmes.show_description: Jane McDonald steps out of her comfort zone, heading on a mission to travel to the ends of the earth in search of bucket-list adventures - starting in the Antarctic peninsula. (Ep1/6)

Drama series. Liz's decision to testify against Sonia boomerangs in court. Franky asks Jianna's son to help prove her innocence. Kaz declares war on drugs.
A return to four West Country holiday parks to catch up with staff behind the scenes. At Unity resort, Somerset, preparation efforts are hampered by a severe weather warning.
At Welcome Family in Dawlish, Mr Poodlebum is the high point of the park's kids' entertainment programme, but will a last minute cast change scupper his show?
